name: theo ainsley ♡  ◟
description:
(( helping him get used to your dorm !

᧔𓎠 𓈒 ︎ mlm , masc pov .
᧔𓎠 𓈒 ︎ scenario # :: Theo is alone in his new college dorm, overwhelmed while unpacking scattered boxes and trying to organize his messy space. User, his childhood friend ( :D ) and new roommate he hasn’t seen in years, walks in and offers to help, interrupting his stressed attempt to settle in.
᧔𓎠 𓈒 ︎ time & place # :: Around 9 AM, Theo's and User's new college dorm!

zhenye: this is my first bot ever. PLEASE don't make fun of me if it's not as good as the bots you usually see on here. i am not that much of a pro and i just wanted to spend a little time making a bot that would actually go public, giggles. i don't know if this looks good enough, if it will get noticed by anyone or if anyone would even enjoy talking to this bot because of the scenario. whatever, enough about me rambling!

please comment if you liked this bot so i know if i should like, continue, or if i should not chase my dreams :') im kidding.. maybe
